title: Cloud war intensifies as Google ties enterprise deals to in-house AI

title: SpaceX lowers IPO valuation target to at least $1.8 trillion
snippet: Bloomberg News reported in April that SpaceX was aiming for a valuation above $2 trillion. The target is settling lower after consultations with advisers and investors, the people said, asking not to be identified as the information isn’t public.

title: PLI 2.0 scheme for mobile phones may ring louder
snippet: In a bold move to reshape the electronics industry, India is enhancing its mobile phone production incentives with a focus on achieving over 55% domestic value addition. The new plan emphasizes local component manufacturing, effectively reducing the reliance on imports of key parts.
